observation.zh: 发现 18 篇笔记，11 篇缺 date，6 篇缺 status
observation.en: Found 18 notes, 11 missing date, 6 missing status

observation.zh: 5 篇样本生成 frontmatter，未猜缺失日期
observation.en: Five samples gained frontmatter without guessed dates

observation.zh: 按 topic/status 分组，能看到待补项
observation.en: Grouped by topic/status and shows pending items

observation.zh: 所有缺失作者、日期、结论单独列出
observation.en: Missing author, date, and conclusion items are listed separately

zh: 原文只移动和补元数据，不删除正文。
待补事项单独列出，不能伪装成已完成知识。
合并前由用户抽查至少 3 篇笔记。
en: Original text is moved and annotated, not deleted.
Missing items are listed separately, not presented as completed knowledge.
The user should spot-check at least three notes before merging.

trigger.zh: 散乱 Markdown 笔记需要按主题、状态和待补事项重整，且保留回退依据。
trigger.en: Loose Markdown notes needed organization by topic, state, and missing items while preserving rollback evidence.

firstSignal.zh: 同一主题有三个命名方式，部分笔记没有 owner 和 status。
firstSignal.en: The same topic had three naming styles and some notes had no owner or status.

doneSignal.zh: 12 篇笔记完成统一头部，索引能按主题和待补项检索。
doneSignal.en: Twelve notes received consistent headers, and the index supports topic and missing-item lookup.
